TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Kin‘lwan, title = Kin‘lwan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kin‘lwan} }

S.FORM: alang Kin'lwan ga niya mki sku Toweng si atu Hosing Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 21 buwan, 66 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 95% kyan ku 63 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspung Gyencumin ga 5% kyan ku 3 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 95%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Kin'lwan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Kin'lwan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Kin'lwan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Kin'lwan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Kin'lwan hya' ga Hbun-sinqumi. tay 'zil na Kin'lwan hya' ga Pyasan. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Kin'lwan ga niya mki sku Toweng si atu Hosing Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 21 buwan, 66 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 95% kyan ku 63 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspung Gyencumin ga 5% kyan ku 3 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 95%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Kin'lwan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Kin'lwan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Kin'lwan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Kin'lwan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Kin'lwan hya' ga Hbun-sinqumi. tay 'zil na Kin'lwan hya' ga Pyasan. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ kinʔlwan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku toweŋ s~ɕi atu ħos~ɕiŋ ku, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, ** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpuŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na kinʔlwan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na kinʔlwan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na kinʔlwan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na kinʔlwan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na kinʔlwan ħjaʔ ɣa ħβun-s~ɕinqumi. taj ʔzil na kinʔlwan ħjaʔ ɣa pjas~ɕan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
